name: One-Pot Pasta a La Puttanesca

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

method: Put pasta, garlic, chilies, basil, paprika, olive oil, olives, anchovies, tomatoes, salt and pepper in a large skillet. Add
Over high heat, bring to a boil. Boil mixture, stirring and keep turning the pasta, until pasta becomes al dente and
water has nearly evaporated, about 12-15 minutes. Serve with Parmesan.
The key ingredient for any pasta is always a good sauce, and this one will not disappoint: it's tangy, creamy, and
cheesy all in one. Topped off with fresh parsley or oregano to mask the scent of shrimp, this dish is perfect as a
date-dish because it looks impressive but requires little effort from you to prepare.
